Title: Voiced dental and alveolar lateral approximants
Description: Consonantal sounds represented by ⟨l⟩ in IPA
Paragraph: Voiced dental and alveolar lateral approximants are a type of consonantal sound used in many spoken languages. It is familiar to English-speakers as the "l" sound in "lift". The symbol in the International Phonetic Alphabet that represents them is ⟨l⟩.
